title: Activated Coal
description: Spend your excess redstone to upgrade your coal into Activated Coal, which burns twice as long.
body:
Spend your excess redstone to upgrade your coal into Activated Coal, which burns twice as long.

The recipe is 8 redstone dust and 1 coal in the middle for 1 Activated Coal.

Activated Coal can smelt 16 items per coal. It does not have a block form.
